name: Vegetarian Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place the crust on a cookie sheet.
3. Arrange the vegetables on top of the crust.
4. Sprinkle the dried basil leaves over the vegetables.
5. Add the shredded mozzarella cheese evenly over the vegetables.
6. Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the toppings are heated through.
